title: Renfe FEVE Pack - MTR/NTE RP
description: This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds some trains and objects of the Renfe FEVE (Spain's narrow rail system) in the game. (⚠️ Not affiliated with any real brand displayed in the pack)
body:
### IMPORTANT!!
**JoanNet Neue version MUST BE VERSION N2 OR HIGHER!!!**
Compatibility of this pack for version MTR 4 or higher is **not guaranteed**.

- Trains:
  - FEVE 2700 Series (FEVE and Pantone)
  - FEVE 2900 Series (FEVE and Pantone)
  - Refurbished FEVE 3500 Series ("Burdeos", Cercanías, FEVE, Pantone, white)
  - Original FEVE 3500 Series (Yellow _[two styles]_, blue, orange/red striped, white)
  - FEVE 3800 Series ("Burdeos", Cercanías, "Pictolín" (Green), Pantone, white) _No interior made in these models, sorry ':)_
- Objects [Powered by JoanNet Neue™]:
  - Dynamic platform signs (Renfe, FEVE)
  - Seats (1m and 2m)
  - Station pole
  - Shelter with dynamic signs
  - Dynamic station signs
  - Displays:
    - FEVE one departure matrix display
    - FEVE departures table matrix display (SPANISH, SPANISH/BASQUE, ENGLISH)
    - FEVE arrivals table matrix display (SPANISH, SPANISH/BASQUE, ENGLISH)
    - Renfe one departure matrix display
    - Renfe LCD display
    - Renfe LCD departures display

You're allowed to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
!!! **_DO NOT USE THIS NEITHER ANY OF MY PACKS FOR TRAINING AIS_** !!!
